sizing_rule.note: Risk 1% of equity per trade, scaled inversely by 10-day ATR volatility. Position size = (account_equity × 0.01) / (ATR_10day × multiplier). Higher volatility → smaller position; lower volatility → larger position.

source_rule_text: Size positions by dividing total account risk (as a percentage of equity) by the volatility-adjusted stop distance, scaled by the contract/instrument multiplier.
